name: Kivu Lakeside Retreat
description: Wake up to the still water of Lake Kivu from your private balcony. This resort blends warm Rwandan hospitality with quiet, considered design, just steps from the shoreline.

reviews.author: Aline M.
reviews.comment: The lake view from the suite was unforgettable. Staff went out of their way to help with our boat trip.

reviews.author: James K.
reviews.comment: Quiet, clean, and the breakfast spread was excellent. Would return.

name: Nyungwe Forest Lodge
description: Tucked at the edge of the rainforest canopy, this lodge is the ideal base for chimpanzee tracking and canopy walks, with cosy rooms warmed by wood-burning stoves.

reviews.author: Sophie R.
reviews.comment: Incredible setting. The guided hike was the highlight of our whole trip.

name: Kigali Heights Apartments
description: Modern serviced apartments above the Kigali skyline, built for business travellers and longer stays alike, with a fully equipped kitchenette in every unit.

reviews.author: Eric N.
reviews.comment: Great for a two week work stay. Fast wifi and the kitchen had everything I needed.

name: Akagera Savanna Camp
description: A tented camp on the edge of Akagera National Park, where game drives start at your doorstep and evenings end around a fire pit under an open sky.

reviews.author: Maria T.
reviews.comment: Saw lions on our first game drive. The camp itself is comfortable without losing the wild feel.

name: Musanze Volcano Villas
description: Private villas with uninterrupted views of the Virunga volcanoes, designed for travellers heading out on gorilla trekking who want comfort to come back to.

reviews.author: Daniel O.
reviews.comment: Best views we've had at any property, anywhere. The private pool was a lovely surprise.

name: Huye Heritage Hotel
description: A long-standing hotel close to the National Museum, with a leafy courtyard restaurant and rooms that favour quiet comfort over flash.

reviews.author: Grace U.
reviews.comment: Simple, clean, and well located for visiting the museum. Breakfast was a nice surprise.

name: Rubavu Beachfront Suites
description: Self-catering suites right on the Rubavu shoreline, with private balconies that catch the sunset over Lake Kivu every evening.

reviews.author: Patrick H.
reviews.comment: Sunset from the balcony every night, worth booking for that alone.

name: Kigali Boutique Hotel
description: A design-forward boutique hotel in the city centre, with a rooftop pool overlooking the hills and an in-house spa for slowing down after meetings.

reviews.author: Linda P.
reviews.comment: The rooftop bar at sunset is reason enough to stay here. Rooms were spotless too.

name: Gisenyi Garden Bungalows
description: Standalone garden bungalows a short walk from the lake, each with its own outdoor sitting area shaded by banana palms.

reviews.author: Thomas B.
reviews.comment: Felt like our own private hideaway. The garden in the morning was the best part of the day.

name: Volcanoes Mist Hotel
description: Set against the misty slopes of the Virungas, this resort is a popular stop before and after gorilla trekking, with a spa built for tired legs.

reviews.author: Olivia C.
reviews.comment: The spa after a day of trekking was exactly what we needed. Staff remembered our names by day two.
